summary: Iteration 30: Testing TopBar redesign (4 equal columns) and P2 component splitting (CustomerDetail.jsx reduced from 972 to 572 lines). All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: TopBar shows 4 equal columns: Data Centers | Sites | Target Solutions | IP Calculator
Data Centers column shows count (2 Data Centers), entry form (DC Name + KW inputs), and stacked tags (Main DC · 10K, DR DC · 10K)
Sites column shows count (2 Sites), entry form (Site Name + KW inputs), and stacked tags (Branch 1 · 5.0K, Branch 2 · 5.0K)
Target Solutions 2x2 grid works correctly (NIOS, UDDI, Security, Asset buttons)
Target Solutions toggle works - NIOS toggled from OFF to ON successfully
IP Calculator shows bigger KW input (h-9 class = 36px height)
IP Calculator calculates correctly: 5000 KW × 2.5 = 13K Active IPs
Discovery tab loads correctly with AssessmentQuestions
Sizing tab loads correctly with DeploymentModel, SizingMathHelp, TokenCalculatorSummary, UDSMembersTable
History tab loads correctly with extracted VersionControl and ImportExportSection components
VersionControl component shows Versions card, Named Revisions (0/5), Auto-Saves (0/10)
ImportExportSection component shows Import Data card, Export Data card with JSON/YAML/CSV buttons
Sidebar navigation works correctly (nav-discovery, nav-sizing, nav-history data-testids)
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx: 4 equal columns implemented with grid-cols-4 gap-4 (line 77)
TopBar.jsx: DC/Site tags stack vertically with flex-col gap-1 max-h-[72px] overflow-y-auto (lines 119, 183)
TopBar.jsx: KW input has bigger size with h-9 class (line 293)
CustomerDetail.jsx: Reduced from 972 to 572 lines by extracting VersionControl and ImportExportSection
VersionControl.jsx: Extracted version management with Named Revisions and Auto-Saves
ImportExportSection.jsx: Extracted import/export with JSON/YAML/CSV support
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer for Discovery' customer with 2 DCs (Main DC, DR DC) and 2 Sites (Branch 1, Branch 2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TopBar redesign verified: 4 equal columns (DC | Sites | Target Solutions | IP Calculator), DC/Site tags stack vertically (max 3 rows), KW input bigger (h-9 class). P2 component splitting verified: CustomerDetail.jsx reduced by 400 lines, VersionControl.jsx and ImportExportSection.jsx extracted and working correctly. Test Customer for Discovery has 2 DCs (Main DC, DR DC with 10K KW each) and 2 Sites (Branch 1, Branch 2 with 5K KW each).

columns: Column 1: Data Centers - count, entry form, stacked tags
Column 2: Sites - count, entry form, stacked tags
Column 3: Target Solutions - 2x2 grid (NIOS, UDDI, Security, Asset)
